summary: Frontend testing PASSED for Shadcn Card CSS variable overrides bug fix. All 6 themes (Default, Gold, Tomboy, Noir, Neon, Dark) correctly apply --card HSL values to rubric matrix cards. The user-reported issue of white card backgrounds in Gold theme making text illegible is FIXED. Cards now have dark themed backgrounds with light readable text in all non-default themes.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All theme-specific card backgrounds working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified the Shadcn Card CSS variable overrides fix. The root cause was that Shadcn Card components use bg-card class which maps to hsl(var(--card)) - set to white in index.css and never overridden by theme CSS. The fix adds --card, --card-foreground, --popover, --popover-foreground, --border, --muted-foreground, --input, --accent, --accent-foreground, --ring, --primary, --destructive HSL overrides to each theme block in App.css.

css_variables_verified.--card: Changes per theme (white for default, dark brown for gold, dark slate for tomboy, dark charcoal for noir, deep green for neon, dark forest for dark)

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: User reported rubric matrix cards with white backgrounds in Gold theme making text completely illegible
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Shadcn Card components use bg-card class which maps to hsl(var(--card)) - set to white (0 0% 100%) in index.css and never overridden by theme CSS
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added --card, --card-foreground, --popover, --popover-foreground, --border, --muted-foreground, --input, --accent, --accent-foreground, --ring, --primary, --destructive HSL overrides to each theme block in App.css
